elements.text:
Your roommates have some strong opinions and you don't always agree with them. One evening, you invite a friend over for dinner and sense some possible tension. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I start a text to cancel the dinner, but remind myself that I really want my friend and roommates to get to know each other.
I start to tell my roommates not to say anything embarrassing in front of my friend, but take a deep breath instead.
I smile as my friend and my roommates talk.
I practice listening closely with an open mind.
I snap at my roommates and tell them to be quiet.
